chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5920 of 2023 Abrar Ahmed Khan Versus M. Kamran Khan & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on Misc. No.27601/23 3. For hearing of main case. Dated: 30.01.2024 Mr. Devo Sagar for petitioner. -.-.- Counsel for petitioner is not at all aware of any facts about the case, either of the trial Court or appellate Court or even in this petition. He is totally silent and has nothing to say about any question put to him. Instant petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application with cost of Rs.5000/- to be deposited with the High Court Clinic in 15 days’ time. Judge Judge
